source.name: 同花顺问财候选 + 东方财富公告/资讯 + 东方财富/Yahoo 量价校验 / iWencai + Eastmoney catalysts + market validation
source.noteZh: 候选源优先接入同花顺问财；公告和新闻标题来自东方财富公开接口；行情列表来自东方财富 push2delay，日 K 优先来自 Yahoo Finance，若 Yahoo 不可用则回退到东方财富 push2his。基本面催化只作为可核验线索，不单独证明上涨因果。
source.noteEn: Candidate sourcing prefers Tonghuashun iWencai. Announcement/news titles come from public Eastmoney endpoints. Quote lists come from Eastmoney push2delay, daily candles prefer Yahoo Finance and fall back to Eastmoney push2his. Fundamental catalysts are verification leads, not proof of causality.

scopeZh: hybrid 模式优先使用同花顺问财候选，再按统一口径复核 1/2/3/20/60/120 日窗口；问财不可用时回退到本项目全市场量价预筛。当前覆盖东方财富沪深 A 股行情集合，包括沪深主板、创业板、科创板。
scopeEn: Hybrid mode prioritizes Tonghuashun iWencai candidates, then re-validates 1/2/3/20/60/120-day windows with one consistent rule set; if iWencai is unavailable it falls back to the in-project full-universe price-volume prefilter. Current coverage is the Eastmoney Shanghai/Shenzhen A-share universe.

providerStatuses.noteZh: 问财返回 10 只候选；本项目随后用公开行情重新校验窗口突破和放量。
providerStatuses.noteEn: iWencai returned 10 candidates; this project then re-validates breakout and volume with public market data.

providerStatuses.noteZh: 本项目在问财候选范围内预筛命中 4 只；最终结果仍需通过窗口前高和窗口均量复核。
providerStatuses.noteEn: The in-project prefilter matched 4 names within the iWencai candidate set; final results still require prior-high and average-volume validation.

providerStatuses.nameZh: 东方财富公告/资讯催化
providerStatuses.noteZh: 近 30 天公告/新闻标题中，为 5 只入选股票找到可展示的基本面或市场催化线索；未找到时会明确提示继续核验。
providerStatuses.noteEn: Announcement/news titles within 30 days produced displayable fundamental or market catalyst leads for 5 qualified stocks; missing evidence is shown explicitly.

criteria.value: 收盘价 > 所选窗口前高 / Close above prior window high

disclaimerZh: 本次以 hybrid 模式扫描候选 10 只，K 线失败 0 只；问财只作候选与标签线索，最终入选由本项目量价口径复核；公告/新闻催化只表示可核验线索，不构成因果证明或投资建议。
disclaimerEn: Scanned 10 candidates in hybrid mode with 0 candle failures. iWencai is used only for candidate and tag hints; final inclusion is re-validated by this project's price-volume rules. Announcement/news catalysts are verification leads, not causality proof or investment advice.
